# Chapter 6: Manufacturing: machining, casting, forming  (~140 pp)
- 6.1 Manufacturing as constrained optimisation (12) · 6.2 Machining: turning, milling, drilling, grinding (25) · 6.3 Casting: sand, investment, die (20) · 6.4 Forming: forging, rolling, drawing, extrusion (20) · 6.5 Sheet-metal processes (15) · 6.6 Joining: welding, brazing, soldering, mechanical (15) · 6.7 Surface treatments (12) · 6.8 Failure section: process variability, tooling wear, hidden defects (21)

**Archetype**: optimisation, scaling, failure. **Project**: machine, cast, or form a small part on actual equipment; document tolerance. **Exercises**: 40.
